command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.118 '
echo === PHASE A FULL SETUP ===

echo --- HOSTNAME ---
sudo hostnamectl set-hostname vm-ecosystem
hostname
echo OK_HOSTNAME

echo --- STATIC IP CONFIG ---
cat /etc/network/interfaces

echo --- DNS FIX ---
sudo tee /etc/resolv.conf > /dev/null << EOF
nameserver 8.8.8.8
nameserver 8.8.4.4
nameserver 1.1.1.1
EOF
cat /etc/resolv.conf
echo OK_DNS

echo --- PACKAGES ---
sudo apt-get update -qq 2>/dev/null | tail -2
sudo apt-get install -y -qq git python3 python3-pip curl wget 2>/dev/null | tail -3
git --version && python3 --version
echo OK_PACKAGES

echo --- AUDIT DIR ---
sudo mkdir -p /opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/compliance
sudo chown -R jose:jose /opt/docker
ls -la /opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/compliance
echo OK_AUDIT_DIR

echo --- MORENO DIR ---
sudo mkdir -p /opt/moreno-ai
sudo chown jose:jose /opt/moreno-ai
ls -la /opt/ | grep moreno
echo OK_MORENO_DIR

echo --- TIME SYNC ---
timedatectl status | head -5
echo OK_TIME

echo === ALL_PHASE_A_DONE ===
' 2>&1
